summary: Comprehensive testing of Project Atlas banking platform completed. Backend APIs 100% functional (20/20 tests passed). Frontend testing revealed 1 critical bug: Admin user details not loading when clicking on users in the admin panel. All other features including signup, login, navigation, support tickets, KYC, and admin tabs are working correctly.

ui_bugs.issue: Clicking on a user in the admin user list does not load user details. The right panel continues to show 'Select a user to view details' even after clicking. This prevents access to critical admin controls (disable/enable user, revoke sessions buttons).
reproduction_steps: 3. Click on any user in the left panel user list
4. Observe that right panel does not update with user details
ui_bugs.expected_behavior: User details should load in the right panel showing user information, accounts, and admin control buttons (disable/enable user, revoke sessions)
ui_bugs.actual_behavior: Right panel remains showing 'Select a user to view details' message
ui_bugs.api_status: Backend API /admin/users/{user_id} is working correctly (verified with direct API test)
ui_bugs.root_cause: Frontend click handler or state update not working properly. The viewUserDetails function exists and API call works, but the UI is not updating.

passed_tests: KYC application retrieval (shows REJECTED status correctly)
Admin user search with filters (name, email, status, role)
Admin ledger operations (top-up, withdraw, charge fee)
Admin ticket status change buttons (In Progress, Resolved, Closed)
New user signup flow (API and UI)
Customer dashboard with light blue gradient design
Navigation tabs (Accounts, KYC, Security, Support) on customer dashboard
Support page navigation and ticket creation UI
Admin dashboard with 4-tab navigation (Users, KYC, Support, Audit)
Admin Support Tickets tab accessible with filters
Visual design with light blue gradients visible on login and dashboard pages

critical.issue: Admin user details not loading on click
critical.description: When clicking on a user in the admin panel user list, the viewUserDetails function is called but the selectedUser state is not updating, preventing the user details panel from rendering. The API endpoint /admin/users/{user_id} is working correctly (verified). The issue is in the frontend state management or React rendering.
critical.suggested_fix: Debug the viewUserDetails function and setSelectedUser state update. Check if there are any React rendering issues or if the response data structure is causing problems. Verify that the selectedUser state is being set correctly and that the conditional rendering logic is working.
critical.test_to_verify: Login as admin, click on any user in the left panel, verify that user details appear in the right panel with disable/enable and revoke sessions buttons visible.

minor.issue: Notification bell icon not clearly visible
minor.description: The notification bell is present in the HTML but may not be visually prominent. This is a minor UX issue.
minor.suggested_fix: Ensure the NotificationBell component is rendering with proper styling and visibility.

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (1 critical bug found out of ~35 features tested)
